description: Add isPreviewMode guards to ALL unguarded mutation functions and inline mutation paths in src/App.jsx. This fixes the reported connection deletion bug and hardens every other mutation path.
steps: Create a new branch from main called 'fix/preview-mode-hardening'
Add isPreviewMode guard to `removeEdge` function (line 4676): change to `const removeEdge = (edgeId) => { if (isPreviewMode) return; takeSnapshot(); ... }`
Add isPreviewMode guard to `clearAllNodes` function (line 4675): change to `const clearAllNodes = () => { if (isPreviewMode) return; takeSnapshot(); ... }`
Add isPreviewMode guard to `updatePin` function (line ~4173): add `if (isPreviewMode) return;` at the start
Add isPreviewMode guard to `deletePin` function (line ~4178): add `if (isPreviewMode) return;` at the start
Add isPreviewMode guard to `togglePinVisibility` function (line ~4192): add `if (isPreviewMode) return;` at the start
Add isPreviewMode guard to `toggleAllPinsVisibility` function (line ~4197): add `if (isPreviewMode) return;` at the start
Add isPreviewMode guard to `reorderTask` function (line ~4295): add `if (isPreviewMode) return;` at the start of the setTasks callback (or before it)
Add isPreviewMode guard to `addTaskGroup` function (line ~4372): add `if (isPreviewMode) return;` at the start
Add isPreviewMode guard to `renameTaskGroup` function (line ~4385): add `if (isPreviewMode) return;` at the start
Add isPreviewMode guard to `updateTaskGroupColor` function (line ~4389): add `if (isPreviewMode) return;` at the start
Add isPreviewMode guard to `deleteTaskGroup` function (line ~4393): add `if (isPreviewMode) return;` before the existing `if (groupId === 'inbox') return;`
Add isPreviewMode guard to `reorderTaskGroup` function (line ~4405): add `if (isPreviewMode) return;` at the start
Add isPreviewMode guard to `handleCanvasImageDrop` function (line ~3960): add `if (isPreviewMode) return;` after the e.preventDefault() and e.stopPropagation() calls
Add isPreviewMode guard to `executePartialImport` function (line ~3341): add `if (isPreviewMode) return;` at the start

Add isPreviewMode guard to the connection creation in the group body onPointerUp handler (line ~5815): add `if (isPreviewMode) { setConnecting(null); setConnectHoverNodeId(null); return; }` before the edge creation logic
Add isPreviewMode guard to the connection creation in the group left port onPointerUp (line ~5909): add the same guard before the takeSnapshot/updateActiveWorkspace call
Add isPreviewMode guard to the connection creation in the node left port onPointerUp (line ~6291): add the same guard before the edge creation logic
Add isPreviewMode guard to the connection creation in the image left port onPointerUp (line ~6058): add the same guard before the edge creation logic

Add isPreviewMode guard to the edge onClick handler (line ~5947): change from `if (e.ctrlKey || e.metaKey) { removeEdge(edge.id); }` to include a preview mode check, e.g. `if ((e.ctrlKey || e.metaKey) && !isPreviewMode) { removeEdge(edge.id); }` - this provides defense in depth even though removeEdge itself now has a guard
Add isPreviewMode guard to `cutNode` function (line ~1573): add `if (isPreviewMode) return;` at the start - cutting is a mutation because it stores state indicating future deletion
Add isPreviewMode guard to `cutGroup` function (line ~1702): add `if (isPreviewMode) return;` at the start
Add isPreviewMode guard to `copyNode` function: NO - copying is a read-only action (just saves to localStorage clipboard). Leave as-is.
Verify that the keyboard shortcut handler (handleKeyDown at line ~1847) properly gates Ctrl+X through the cutNode/cutGroup guards now that they have guards
acceptance_criteria: Running `npm run build` succeeds with no errors
The removeEdge function has an isPreviewMode guard
The clearAllNodes function has an isPreviewMode guard
The updatePin function has an isPreviewMode guard
The deletePin function has an isPreviewMode guard
The togglePinVisibility function has an isPreviewMode guard
The toggleAllPinsVisibility function has an isPreviewMode guard
The reorderTask function has an isPreviewMode guard
All task group mutation functions (add, rename, updateColor, delete, reorder) have isPreviewMode guards
The handleCanvasImageDrop function has an isPreviewMode guard
The executePartialImport function has an isPreviewMode guard
All four connection creation onPointerUp handlers have isPreviewMode guards
The edge onClick handler for Ctrl+Click deletion has an isPreviewMode check
The cutNode and cutGroup functions have isPreviewMode guards
verification: Run `npm run build` in the project root and confirm it exits with code 0
Run `grep -c 'if (isPreviewMode) return' src/App.jsx` and confirm the count has increased significantly from the baseline (~35 guards to ~55+ guards)
findings: Build passes. Guard count increased from 44 to 60 (16 new guards). All cutNode/cutGroup useCallback dependency arrays updated to include isPreviewMode to avoid stale closure issues. All 4 inline connection creation paths guarded. Edge onClick handler uses defense-in-depth pattern with !isPreviewMode condition.
